synopsis:
**From the High Republic to the Original Trilogy and Beyond!**

Jabba the Hutt! Darth Vader! Mace Windu! Keeve Trennis, Thrawn and more! Introducing new characters, new twists and new turns across all of Marvel's Star Wars line! This star-studded issue puts the pieces on the board for what's to come in a galaxy far, far away!
title: Revelations (2023) #1
